string_lines: pCryptoGenerator->Salt(aWorkLaneC, pWorkspace->mDerivedSaltA, pWorkspace->mDerivedSaltB, pWorkspace->mDerivedSaltC, pWorkspace->mDerivedSaltD, pWorkspace->mDerivedSBoxA, pWorkspace->mDerivedSBoxB, pWorkspace->mDerivedSBoxC, pWorkspace->mDerivedSBoxD);
